summary: ANDROID | Falcon Grey | EQ settings not saved for Custom
scenario: Custom EQ settings are not persisted after saving and reopening the EQ settings screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
description_clean: Custom EQ settings are not saved after clicking Save. When reopening the EQ settings, the previously saved custom adjustments are lost.
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust any frequency band sliders (e.g., Bass, Mid, Treble)
Tap the Save button to save the custom EQ preset
Re-open the Equalizer settings via Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: The previously saved custom EQ adjustments should be displayed and applied.
actual: The previously saved custom EQ adjustments are lost and the Equalizer shows default/flat settings.
